nodes.label: sanad-scanner-active.png
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Sanad app showing the 'Today' (اليوم) daily-operations view for a lawyer. Despite the filename referencing 'scanner-active', the highlighted sidebar item is 'Today'. Layout is fully RTL Arabic. Main content shows five prioritised daily tasks (NDA follow-up, court scheduling, labour-law review, hearing file prep, VAT declaration). A large 'ابدأ تركيز (Start Focus)' CTA anchors the bottom. Footer confirms PWA-enabled and local-server connection. Right sidebar lists all navigation sections.

properties.subtitle: العمليات اليومية (Daily Operations)
today_priority_tasks: متابعة توقيع اتفاقية السرية – NDA follow-up (sent 5 days ago)
تأكيد موعد الجلسة – Confirm Al-Suleiman hearing date
مراجعة تحديث قانون العمل – Review remote-work labour decree
تجهيز ملف الجلسة – Prepare Al-Suleiman inheritance hearing file
تقديم إقرار ضريبة القيمة المضافة – Submit VAT declaration via Zakat portal
properties.footer_status: متصل بالخادم المحلي • PWA مفعل (Connected to local server • PWA enabled)
properties.target_market: Saudi Arabia – Lawyers and Small Businesses

nodes.label: Today / Daily Priorities View
nodes.description: UX pattern showing a curated list of the lawyer's top daily tasks with brief context lines, designed to surface actionable items without requiring navigation to individual case or document views

nodes.label: RTL Arabic UI Design
nodes.description: The entire app uses right-to-left layout with Arabic text, sidebar docked on the right, and content flowing RTL. Includes EN/AR language switcher in the top bar.

nodes.label: PWA + Local Server Architecture
nodes.description: App is installable as a PWA and connects to a local (on-device or LAN) server, shown by footer status. Enables offline-capable legal-operations tooling without cloud dependency.

nodes.label: Dual-Role Switcher (Student / Lawyer)
nodes.description: Top-bar toggle lets the user switch between Student (طالب) and Lawyer (محامي) personas, changing the available views and content
